package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_benchmark_includes_setup_in_loop: Layer: Profiling and benchmarking. Flag Go benchmarks that perform setup inside the timed loop without ResetTimer.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule574NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario574Negative(records []Rule574NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
